artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2025-05-31
artifacts.excerpt:
3) Seminality

The Medici could fund art in transformative ways because they were part of the first wave of bourgeoisie. Funding the top 1% of artists was really high impact. Now the top 1% of artists are already basically funded, so you're funding much more marginal art
